notes: Dashboard: cot Type + Danh muc thanh combobox chon tu Lumi API, tu dien danh muc trung ten, tu nhan theo mau gildan/comfort, khoa dong da sua tay. Chan lan chuot doi gia tri combobox + khong go truc tiep tren ca 3 bang. Sua Fill cot (fill-all). Them Xoa dong + Loc trung tren Dashboard, Xoa dong cho Tao HJ. Mining/Retry chay duoc vao tab Import. Tai file tu web nap thang vao bang. Sidebar highlight muc dang mo. Chong crash toan cuc (error.log).
